mapper.select:
SELECT rb.id, rb.live_room_id as liveRoomId, lr.title as roomTitle, rb.user_id as userId, su.user_name as userName, su.true_name as userTrueName, su.phone as userPhone, su.avatar as userAvatar, rb.operator_id as operatorId, op.user_name as operatorName, op.true_name as operatorTrueName, rb.reason, rb.create_time as createTime, DATEDIFF(NOW(), rb.create_time) as banDurationDays FROM room_blacklist rb LEFT JOIN live_room lr ON rb.live_room_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON rb.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN sys_user op ON rb.operator_id = op.id
AND rb.live_room_id = #{query.liveRoomId}
AND rb.user_id = #{query.userId}
AND rb.operator_id = #{query.operatorId}
AND su.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userName}, '%')
AND su.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userPhone}, '%')
ORDER BY
rb.create_time
su.user_name
lr.title
rb.create_time
ASC
DESC
